testcase.name: VerifyInvalidLoginScenarios

failure.message:
Locator expected to contain text Expected: PASS Received: Email and Password Doesn't match Call log: - Assert "containsText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator(".errorMessage") 9 × locator resolved to

…

- unexpected value "Email and Password Doesn't match"

testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Locator expected to contain text Expected: PASS Received: Email and Password Doesn't match Call log: - Assert "containsText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator(".errorMessage") 9 × locator resolved to

…
